evals.prompt: Triage a LAMMPS run with lost atoms, pressure blow-up, and NaN temperature.
assertions: failure_triage.py infers pressure-blowup from the 'Lost atoms' log line even though only nan was passed as a symptom (evidence.symptoms == ['nan', 'pressure-blowup'])
classifies the inferred pressure-blowup symptom with category 'bad initial state' and first_action 'Minimize/equilibrate first and check density, overlaps, and barostat.'
fourth immediate_action reports 'revert or isolate recent change: increased timestep'

script_checks.description: failure_triage infers pressure-blowup from log and classifies it

assert.value: Reduce timestep, check initial overlaps, bounds, and material parameters.
Minimize/equilibrate first and check density, overlaps, and barostat.
revert or isolate recent change: increased timestep

evals.prompt: Diagnose a VASP electronic nonconvergence failure after changing smearing.
assertions: failure_triage.py classifies the nonconvergence symptom with category 'solver convergence' and first_action 'Inspect residual history, preconditioner, tolerance, and initial guess.'
the recent change 'changed smearing' appears as the fourth immediate_action, exactly 'revert or isolate recent change: changed smearing'
stop_conditions[1] is 'results depend on arbitrary stabilizing changes'

script_checks.description: failure_triage classifies VASP nonconvergence with fixed retry/stop text

assert.value: Inspect residual history, preconditioner, tolerance, and initial guess.
revert or isolate recent change: changed smearing
change one solver or resource parameter at a time
results depend on arbitrary stabilizing changes

evals.prompt: My MD run cannot find the potential for one species.
assertions: failure_triage.py classifies missing-potential with category 'missing model data' and first_action 'Locate potential/pseudopotential and verify species mapping.'
the first stop_condition is exactly 'required potential or pseudopotential cannot be verified'
no recent-change immediate_action is appended (immediate_actions has exactly 3 entries) since none was supplied

script_checks.description: failure_triage classifies missing-potential and pins stop condition

assert.value: Locate potential/pseudopotential and verify species mapping.
required potential or pseudopotential cannot be verified
rerun a smaller case with extra diagnostics
